zh.lifeSummary: 當James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun於1576年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse24歲，母親Nicolas Maxwell22歲。他於大約1617年與Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1650年4月19日在他的家鄉享年74歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安霍利盧德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun于1576年出生在英国苏格兰艾丁波时，他的父亲Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse24岁，母亲Nicolas Maxwell22岁。他于大约1617年与Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1650年4月19日在他的家乡享年74岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安霍利盧德。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun was born in 1576, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse, was 24 and his mother, Nicolas Maxwell, was 22. He married Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun about 1617, in East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 19 April 1650, in his hometown, at the age of 74, and was buried in Holyrood, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun est né en 1576, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Nicolas Maxwell, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun environ 1617, à East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1650, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Holyrood, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun 1576 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse 24 und seine Mutter Nicolas Maxwell 22. Er hat um 1617 in East Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. April 1650 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Holyrood, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun è nato il nel 1576 nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Nicolas Maxwell, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun circa 1617, nel East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 aprile 1650, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Holyrood, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletounが1576年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouseは24歳，母Nicolas Maxwellは22歳であった。約1617年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンでDame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletounと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1650年4月19日に故郷で74歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドミドロスアンホーリルーッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun(이)가 1576년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Nicolas Maxwell(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1617년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언에서 Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1650년 4월 19일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 홀이루드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun nasceu em 1576, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Nicolas Maxwell, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun aproximadamente 1617, em East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1650, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Holyrood, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun родился в 1576 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Nicolas Maxwell, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun около 1617 г. в местности эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 апреля 1650 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности холируд, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Maxwell 1st Earl of Dirletoun nació en 1576, en Edinburgh, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Maxwell of Kirkhouse, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Nicolas Maxwell, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Dame Elizabeth de Bussoyne Podolsko, Duchess of Dirletoun aproximadamente 1617, en East Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de abril de 1650, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Holyrood, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido.
